/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/mock-log_unittest.dir/src/mock-log_unittest.cc.o -o mock-log_unittest  CMakeFiles/glog_internal.dir/src/demangle.cc.o CMakeFiles/glog_internal.dir/src/flags.cc.o CMakeFiles/glog_internal.dir/src/logging.cc.o CMakeFiles/glog_internal.dir/src/raw_logging.cc.o CMakeFiles/glog_internal.dir/src/signalhandler.cc.o CMakeFiles/glog_internal.dir/src/stacktrace.cc.o CMakeFiles/glog_internal.dir/src/symbolize.cc.o CMakeFiles/glog_internal.dir/src/utilities.cc.o CMakeFiles/glog_internal.dir/src/vlog_is_on.cc.o ../lib/libgmock.a ../lib/libgtest.a
